description: Customer service block with centered heading and a two-by-two grid of promotional cards with a vertical icon strip.
goals: Keep the service cards concise and benefit-focused
Use short uppercase headings for strong hierarchy

fieldGuidance.heading: 2-4 words, uppercase service category heading.
fieldGuidance.items[].title: 2-4 words, punchy benefit statement.
fieldGuidance.items[].icon: Use a valid Font Awesome icon class name without the style prefix (e.g. fa-plus).
